# Critique of the Power of Judgment

*[Kant](../philosophers/kant.md) · 1790*

The third of the three Critiques, it analyses aesthetic judgment, where the beautiful pleases universally without a concept, and teleological judgment, which conceives the purposiveness of living things as a regulative principle. It seeks to bridge nature and freedom.
